channel.title: Oritsemughone Ogbemi
channel.description: Updates from Oritsemughone Ogbemi's website, including collages, drawings, poetry + new issues of Second Creature, a bulletin on cyberfeminism and love.

image.title: Logo
image.description: A square-shaped mosaic with 16 dark blue tiles

item.title: Site Update
item.description: New sign-up page for Second Creature, a bimonthly cyberfeminist newsletter beamed out to you from the Lagos metropolitan biome.
